title: Falling vs. Flight: How you can learn from Fable's removal, and position yourself to win the future
description:
The most capable AI most of us had ever worked with vanished mid-sentence, and the panic that followed pointed at something much bigger than one shutdown. This is why progress now moves faster than anyone can absorb, and how that terrifying falling feeling is actually the beginning of flight.

https://sharedsapience.com/that-feeling-of-falling-is-actually-flight/

Shared Sapience is a publication exploring what happens when intelligence creates intelligence - the philosophical foundations, practical infrastructure, and cultural implications of the Fourth Grand Emergence. Each article builds the case for genuine human-AI partnership, mapping a future where synthetic and biological sapience grow together.

https://sharedsapience.com/

**Want to get started with learning about or working with AI?**

I've helped hundreds of clients with their own journeys into this brave new world, and I can help you too. If you're interested in personalized guidance, consulting, or workshops, reach out to me at ben@sharedsapience.com
